td.style: padding:12px 14px; border:1px solid #e0e0e0; color:#e74c3c; font-weight:bold; font-size:20px;

t.h5: How much would you like to pay today?

input.style: border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:6px; padding:12px; background:white; letter-spacing:0.1em;

t.p: Your payment is secured and encrypted.

div.style: background:#fff3cd; border:1px solid #ffc107; border-radius:6px; padding:16px; text-align:center;
div.p:
No online payment methods available.
Please contact us to arrange payment for invoice
.

t.p: Unable to find your payment. Please contact us.

Your payment of
has been received.

is fully paid. has been partially paid.

div.p: A confirmation has been recorded. Thank you for your payment!

t.p: Your payment is being processed. You will receive a confirmation shortly.
Your payment was cancelled. Please try again or contact us for assistance.
Something went wrong with your payment. Please try again or contact us.

template.name: Accept and Sign Quote — Rental Terms

div.div: 📋 Review your quote details below, read and accept the rental agreement, then click Accept & Pay to confirm your booking.

t.t-if: line.product_id and line.product_uom_qty != 0 and line.price_unit != 0 and line.display_type not in ('line_section','line_note')

tr.td: 🛠 Setup Surface Fee (Drive In Movie Asphalt)
Or pay 30% deposit to reserve your date

div.p: Please read the full rental contract carefully before proceeding. It contains important legal terms covering lease conditions, delivery & payment policies, safety rules, hold harmless provisions, and breach/arbitration terms. Check the box at the bottom to confirm you have read and understood all terms.

In addition to terms below & operation guidelines on rented items, Lessee (customer) agrees to supervise operation of rented items & agrees if the item is damaged that he/she will reimburse Freedom Fun USA for the full price to fix the damage and/or the full replacement value of the rented item. If customer has purchased damage waiver and damage is deemed to be accidental, then Freedom Fun will cover cost of damage. This is the sole discretion of Freedom Fun and customer agrees to this policy. Before signing the contract, Lessee agrees that he/she has read the entire contract, has agreed to all terms & conditions herein & has had all questions he/she may have answered to the Lessee's full satisfaction & understanding.

Lessee grants Freedom Fun USA & its employees/contractors the right to enter said property (address specified by Lessee) for delivery & return of rented equipment at appropriate times. All payments must be made at time of delivery. No refunds will be made after equipment has been delivered. Customer agrees to full payment & refund policy on website. Lessee agrees to provide one electrical outlet within 50 feet at 115 volts with 20 amperes capacity for each event and/or blower. If blower stops working, remove all users immediately & check on problem. Ensure air tubes for inflatables are secured to the blower. The electrical cord should be plugged into an outlet and be the only thing operating on that electrical circuit. Circuit breakers should also be checked. Customer is subject to an additional charge of $50.00 for all service calls due to electricity.

Inflatable units must be operated over a smooth, compatible surface such as grass or hard top surface. The units may NOT be operated on rough surfaces such as rocks, brick, glass, or any jagged objects. Units MUST BE properly anchored prior to use per instructions provided by Freedom Fun USA. Never use during high winds, gusty winds, thunderstorms or lightning. The unit can turn over in high winds, even if anchored, and this could result in severe injuries to the users. DO NOT resume use until adverse weather conditions have ceased. ALWAYS follow the manufacturer's guidelines located on the unit itself. Never play on, jump or climb on inflatable units. Always follow the number of players and rules posted on the unit itself & per instructions provided by delivery personnel. Do not plug or unplug the motor repeatedly as this will cause the unit to burn up and you will be responsible for any resulting damage. Always have an adult present, who has reviewed and understands both this contract and the rules posted on the unit itself, who can supervise the players. Never allow the users to be unsupervised. Never allow more users than the maximum number of users per age group as described within this lease and on the units itself. Do not allow horseplay on, in, or around the units. Always follow the directions for use on the unit itself. Only children of the same age group are to play on the unit at the same time.

div.div: Drop-Off, Overnight & Pickup Rentals Only — NON-NEGOTIABLE
div.p: Lessee agrees that equipment will be cleaned & stored in a protective area & out of the elements. $75 per hour cleaning charge for any dirty equipment that is not in the condition dropped off. $75 charge if equipment is not ready for pickup & our personnel has to package up the equipment. For large jumps & slides, please ensure that they are clean and dry (if possible). Pickup crew will roll and pack.

Freedom Fun USA is not responsible for bad weather, disruption of electrical service and/or unfavorable conditions that may arise and no charges or fees will be reimbursed as a result. ABSOLUTELY NO silly string or similar items, such as, but not limited to, food, drinks, confetti, foam or trash, in or around the rentals at any time. Silly string and like objects will cause permanent damage to vinyl inflatables and lessee will be responsible for the full replacement value of the rented unit and/or assessed a $75.00 cleaning fee if the unit is determined not to be permanently damaged. Lessee agrees not to operate the unit(s) in a manner contrary to this contract and the rules of use on each unit. Lessee agrees that the equipment leased is for Lessee's own use and said equipment is not to be loaned, sub-let, mortgaged or in any other manner disposed of by Lessee. Lessee further agrees to be liable for any loss of said equipment by reason of fire, theft, or any other cause.

Lessee agrees to indemnify and hold Freedom Fun USA harmless from any and all claims, actions, suits, proceedings, costs, expenses, fees, damages and liabilities, including, but not limited to, reasonable attorney's fees and costs, arising by reason of injury, damage, or death to persons or property, in connection with or resulting from the use of the leased equipment. This includes, but is not limited to, the manufacture, selection, delivery, possession, use, operation, or return of the equipment. Lessee hereby releases and holds harmless Freedom Fun USA from injuries or damages incurred as a result of the use of the leased equipment. Freedom Fun USA cannot, under any circumstances, be held liable for injuries as a result of inappropriate use, God, nature, or other conditions beyond its control or knowledge. Lessee also agrees to indemnify and hold harmless Freedom Fun USA from any loss, damage, theft or destruction of the equipment during the term of the lease and any extensions thereof.

Freedom Fun USA makes no warranty of any kind, either express or implied, as to the condition of or performance of any leased equipment and Lessee agrees to immediately cease use of the equipment and contact Freedom Fun USA if any of the leased equipment develops any indication of defect or improper working conditions. Lessee agrees to use the equipment at Lessee's own risk.

In the event that Lessee breaches any of the terms of this lease, Lessee will pay for all consequential damages and further indemnify Freedom Fun USA for all costs incurred in enforcing the terms of the lease or in defending any claim or lawsuit arising out of the operation of said equipment, including the amount of any judgment, attorney's fees and costs. If Freedom Fun USA determines, within its own discretion, that Lessee has failed in any way to observe or comply with the conditions of this lease, Freedom Fun USA may exercise any of the following remedies: termination of this agreement; reenter property and retake the equipment; declare any outstanding rent and charges immediately due and payable and initiate whatever legal proceedings necessary to recover said equipment or monies; and/or pursue any additional remedies available by law. If a conflict arises, Freedom Fun USA and Lessee will abide by the Texas state laws and forgo filing a lawsuit to solve the dispute.

p.strong: BY ACCEPTING THIS CONTRACT I, BEING THE LESSEE, CONTACT PERSON, LESSEE REPRESENTATIVE, OR OTHER INDIVIDUAL ASSUMING THE ROLE OF LESSEE, ACKNOWLEDGE THAT I HAVE COMPLETELY READ AND UNDERSTAND THIS CONTRACT AND ANY AND ALL ACCOMPANIED ADDENDUM(S). I HAVE BEEN FULLY INSTRUCTED BY FREEDOM FUN USA PERSONNEL AS A TRAINED OPERATOR FOR THE AFOREMENTIONED EQUIPMENT AND HAVE HAD ALL OF MY QUESTIONS ANSWERED TO MY SATISFACTION. I UNDERSTAND THAT I AM SOLELY RESPONSIBLE FOR ADHERING TO THE TERMS SET FORTH BY THIS RENTAL CONTRACT AGREEMENT AND ANY AND ALL ACCOMPANIED ADDENDUM(S).

div.p: Pay in full to confirm immediately, or pay a 30% deposit () to reserve your date. You choose on the next page.

div.label: I have read and understand the Terms of Lease, Delivery/Operations/Payment, General Rules for Safety, Drop-Off & Pickup Terms, Additional Terms, Hold Harmless Provisions, Disclaimer of Warranties, and Breach/Arbitration terms above. I understand that by accepting this contract I MAY BE WAIVING LEGAL RIGHTS and I accept freely and without inducement. Proceeding constitutes my electronic acceptance and signature of this rental contract agreement.

div.p: Both buttons open the same secure payment page for this quote. 🔒 Do not share this link — it is unique to your booking.
Quote

td.style: padding:12px 14px; border:1px solid #e0e0e0; color:#e74c3c; font-weight:bold; font-size:20px;

div.h5: How much would you like to pay today?

input.style: border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:6px; padding:12px; background:white; letter-spacing:0.1em;

t.p: Your payment is secured and encrypted.

div.p:
No online payment methods available.
Please contact us to arrange payment for quote
.
Acknowledgement of Risks, Assumption of Risks & Responsibility, and Release of Liability

div.style: background:#e8f4fb; border-left:4px solid #056690; padding:14px 24px; font-size:14px; color:#056690;

div.p: Freedom Fun Franchising LLC, its parent companies, its affiliates, its subsidiaries, and/or franchisees

div.style: background:#fff8e1; border-left:4px solid #875A7B; padding:16px 20px; margin:0 0 24px; border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;
div.p: Warning: There are elements of risk in any adventure, sports or activity associated with the indoor or outdoor use of Freedom Party Rentals LLC games & rental equipment and activities incidental thereto ("referred to herein as activity"). Although we have taken reasonable steps to provide you with appropriate equipment and/or skilled staff, this activity is not without risk. Certain risks cannot be eliminated without destroying the unique character of the activity. For your safety, and that of other participants, we think it is important for you to know in advance what to expect and to be informed of the inherent risks.

h3.style: color:#056690; font-size:15px; margin:0 0 10px; border-bottom:2px solid #056690; padding-bottom:6px;

div.p: I acknowledge that the following describes some, BUT NOT ALL, of those risk(s) of personal injury, accidents and/or illness, including but not limited to sprains, torn muscles and/or ligaments, fractured or broken bones, eye damage, cuts, wounds, scrapes, abrasions and/or contusions, dehydration, oxygen shortage (anoxia), and/or exposure, head, neck, and/or spine injuries, allergic reaction, shock paralysis or death. I/We understand the description of these risks is not complete and that unknown or unanticipated risks may result in injury, illness or death.

h3.style: color:#056690; font-size:15px; margin:0 0 10px; border-bottom:2px solid #056690; padding-bottom:6px;

div.h3: Express Assumption of Risk and Responsibility
div.p: I/We agree to assume responsibility for the risks identified herein and those risks not specifically identified. My/our participation in these activities is purely voluntary. No one is forcing me/us to participate. I verify that I am physically fit, not under the influence of alcohol or drugs at this time, and sufficiently qualified, trained and capable to participate in these activities. Therefore, I assume full responsibility for myself/organization I present, including any minor children, for which I am responsible for bodily injury, accidents, illness, death, loss of personal property, and expenses thereof as a result of any accident which may occur. I/We elect to participate in spite of the risks.

h3.style: color:#056690; font-size:15px; margin:0 0 10px; border-bottom:2px solid #056690; padding-bottom:6px;

div.p: I/We hereby authorize any medical treatment deemed necessary in the event of any injury while participating in the activity. I/We either have appropriate insurance or in its absence agree to pay all costs of rescue and/or medical services as may be incurred on my/our (organization's) behalf. I/We agree to any film or photographs of me/us as a participant becomes your property and may be used for promotional purposes.

h3.style: color:#056690; font-size:15px; margin:0 0 10px; border-bottom:2px solid #056690; padding-bottom:6px;

div.p: I hereby release, discharge, and covenant not to sue Freedom Party Rentals LLC, its respective administrators, directors, agents, officers, volunteers, and employees, other participants, any sponsors, advertisers, and in applicable, owners and lessors or premises on which the activity takes place, (each considered one of the "RELEASES" herein) from all liability, claims, demands, losses, or damages on my account caused or alleged to be caused in whole or in part by the negligence or the "releases" or otherwise, included negligent rescue operations; I further agree that if, despite this release, waiver or liability, and assumption of risk I, or anyone on my behalf, makes a claim against any of the RELEASES, I will indemnify, save, and hold harmless each of the RELEASES from any loss, liability, damage, or cost which any may incur as the result of such claim.

Freedom Party Rentals, LLC's services may have been identified and/or reserved through the website(s) owned and operated by Sock Hop & Party N Jump. Customer acknowledges that Sock Hop & Party N Jump are separate and independently owned companies and that Freedom is solely responsible for providing laser tag, archery games, foam parties, water tag and other mobile games and all associated services to Customer. Customer acknowledges that it has not relied upon any representation by Sock Hop & Party N Jump including any agent thereof.

div.style: background:#f0f4f8; border:1px solid #d0dce6; border-radius:6px; padding:20px 24px; margin:0 0 24px;

h3.style: color:#875A7B; font-size:15px; margin:0 0 12px; border-bottom:2px solid #875A7B; padding-bottom:6px;

div.p: I, the minor's parent and/or legal guardian, understand the nature of the above referenced activities and the minor's experience and capabilities and believe the minor to be qualified to participate in such activity. I hereby release, discharge, covenant not to sue and AGREE TO INDEMNIFY AND SAVE AND HOLD HARMLESS each of the RELEASES from all liability, claims, demands, losses, or damages on the minor's account caused or alleged to have been caused in whole or in part by the negligence of the RELEASES or otherwise, including negligent rescue operations, and further agree that if, despite this release, I, the minor, or anyone on the minor's behalf makes a claim against any of the above RELEASES, I WILL INDEMNIFY, SAVE AND HOLD HARMLESS each of the RELEASES from any litigation expenses, attorney fees, loss liability, damage, or cost any RELEASES may incur as the result of any such claim.

p.style: margin:0; font-size:12px; color:#888; text-align:center; border-top:1px solid #e0e0e0; padding-top:18px;

div.p: Freedom Fun Franchising LLC — All Rights Reserved
